title: ExecutionGraph
description: Structured args envelope passed by Opus pre-flight to every execution-style workflow. Built from wave_plan frontmatter; consumed verbatim by the workflow script. No shell/FS access from the script — all derivation happens in Opus.

waves.description: Sequential dependency levels. Each wave runs to completion before the next begins.

tier.description: Execution tier. Tier 1 = execute-contract (single sprint); Tier 2/3 = execute-plan (wave-driven).

plan_ref.description: Relative path from repo root to the source implementation plan file. Used by agents to read full plan context.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp passed from Opus (not generated inside the script — Date.now() and Math.random() are forbidden).

budget_total.description: Token ceiling for this run, derived from the plan's effort_estimate. Mapped to budget.total in the workflow.

dry_run.description: When true, the workflow returns the parsed graph for inspection without spawning implementation agents.

mode.description: Delegation mode per delegation-modes.md. Mode D phases are workflow boundaries — the script must return needs_opus without executing them.

review_intensity.description: Reviewer gate routing. 'council' routes to agentType:'council-review'; 'tier3' routes to 'karen'; 'standard' routes to 'task-completion-validator'.

isolation.description: When 'worktree', each implementation agent receives isolation:'worktree'. Required for phases with parallel file-mutating tasks.

phase_strategy.description: When 'adaptive', tasks cannot be enumerated up front; the workflow spawns agentType:'phase-owner' instead of dispatching per-task agents directly.

fix_agent.description: Optional override agentType for fix-loop agents. Defaults to the assigned_to of the first completed task in the phase.

batches.description: List of batches; each batch is a list of Task objects run in parallel; batches run serially (file-ownership ordering).

id.description: Stable task identifier, e.g. 'TASK-1.1'. Used as agent label and in progress YAML.

prompt.description: Full agent prompt including Mode marker, implementation instructions, and file paths. Must include 'Do NOT git add/commit/push/stash' for implementation agents.

assigned_to.description: agentType string referencing a registered agent definition (e.g. 'python-backend-engineer', 'ui-engineer-enhanced'). Prefer agentType over inline prompts to reuse tested agent definitions with their skills/permissions/memory.

model.description: Model override for this task. Omit to inherit session model. Use 'haiku' for mechanical search/extraction; 'sonnet' for implementation (default); 'opus' for deep reasoning/orchestration.

effort.description: Story-point effort estimate from the plan. Used to weight budget allocation and set scope expectations.

files_affected.description: Relative paths of files this task is expected to modify. Used by Opus to precompute file-ownership batches. Mode D detection: if any path touches auth/payments/migrations/deletion signal files, mode should be 'D'.

isolation.description: Per-task isolation override. Inherits from parent Phase.isolation if omitted.

mode.description: Per-task mode override. Inherits from parent Phase.mode if omitted.
